description: Inventory movement transaction history table for Oracle Inventory. Each record represents a material transaction such as receipt, issue, transfer, adjustment, return, or WIP movement and provides the operational and costing detail required for inventory visibility, valuation, and audit tracking.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the inventory material transaction.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory item master record associated with the transaction.

columns.name: REVISION
columns.description: Business attribute of the material transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory organization or operating organization that owns the record.

columns.name: SUBINVENTORY_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying subinventory for the record.

columns.name: LOCATOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory locator used for the material transaction.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory transaction type that classifies the material movement.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_ACTION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory transaction action that determines how stock is affected.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the source type that explains what business process created the inventory transaction.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related transaction source record.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_SOURCE_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with transaction source.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity moved by the inventory transaction in the entered transaction unit of measure.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_UOM
columns.description: Unit of measure used for transaction.

columns.name: PRIMARY_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity associated with primary for the transaction.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_DATE
columns.description: Date on which the inventory material movement was recorded.

columns.name: VARIANCE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing variance for the transaction.

columns.name: ACCT_PERIOD_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related acct period record.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_REFERENCE
columns.description: User-entered or system-generated reference describing the source of the material transaction.

columns.name: REASON_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the reason code definition explaining why the transaction occurred.

columns.name: DISTRIBUTION_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related distribution account record.

columns.name: ENCUMBRANCE_ACCOUNT
columns.description: Business attribute of the material transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ENCUMBRANCE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing encumbrance for the transaction.

columns.name: COST_UPDATE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related cost update record.

columns.name: COSTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether costed applies to the record.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_GROUP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related transaction group record.

columns.name: INVOICED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether invoiced applies to the record.

columns.name: ACTUAL_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the material transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_COST

columns.name: NEW_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the material transaction used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency code in which the transaction is denominated.

columns.name: CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value currency conversion for the transaction.

columns.name: CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control currency conversion processing.

columns.name: CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE

columns.name: QUANTITY_ADJUSTED
columns.description: Quantity associated with quantity for the transaction.

business_questions: Show material transaction history for an inventory item.
Find inventory issues, receipts, transfers, and adjustments by date.
Display transactions by organization, subinventory, and locator.
Show transaction cost, quantity, and source reference details.
Find transactions by transaction type or source type.
Trace inventory movements related to a purchase receipt or work order.
Identify costed versus uncosted material transactions.
Show transfer transactions between organizations or subinventories.
